players.name: Bree Hall
players.injury_comment: Hall will sit out Saturday's contest in order to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental pact. She has yet to make her regular-season debut, and her next chance to do so will come Tuesday against the Tempo.

players.name: Justine Pissott
players.injury_comment: Pissott won't suit up Saturday as the Fever manage her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next chance to make her WNBA regular-season debut will come Tuesday against Toronto.
